summary: Completed frontend testing of Tinkú Phase 4 - Student Auth. CRITICAL BLOCKER: Anonymous sign-ins are disabled in Supabase, preventing student login flow from working. All other tested features (entrar page UI, input validation, error messages, middleware guards, cross-role redirects) work correctly.

critical.issue: Supabase anonymous sign-ins are disabled. Error: 'Anonymous sign-ins are disabled'. This blocks the entire student login flow.
critical.fix: Enable anonymous sign-ins in Supabase Dashboard: Authentication > Providers > Anonymous Sign-In > Enable

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete login due to Supabase anonymous sign-in being disabled. Shows generic error '¡Uy! Algo no salió bien. Probá de nuevo en un momento.'

action_items: CRITICAL: Enable anonymous sign-ins in Supabase Dashboard (Authentication > Providers > Anonymous Sign-In)
After enabling anonymous sign-ins, retest the full student login flow: /entrar → submit code → /islas
critical_code_review_comments: The islas/page.tsx has a potential null reference issue at line 28: `user!.user_metadata` - the non-null assertion could fail if middleware doesn't properly redirect. Consider adding defensive check: `const meta = (user?.user_metadata as {...} | null) ?? {};`
seed_data_creation: No new data created. Used existing student Mateo E. with code 74RTPM.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 student auth partially tested. BLOCKER: Supabase anonymous sign-ins disabled. Once enabled, retest: (1) student login with code 74RTPM, (2) /islas page rendering with greeting, (3) island-math navigation to /isla/numeros, (4) back-to-islas link, (5) islas-signout button.
tests_passed: /entrar page renders with entrar-page, entrar-code-input (maxLength=6, autoCapitalize=characters, font-mono, uppercase), entrar-submit button, help text
Invalid format error: code '11ABC1' (contains 1) shows 'El código tiene 6 letras y números.'
Non-existent code error: code 'KXJP9M' shows 'Mmm, ese código no funciona. Pedile ayuda a un adulto.'
Student detail page shows login-code '74RTPM' for Mateo E.
tests_failed: Student login with valid code 74RTPM: BLOCKED - Supabase anonymous sign-ins disabled
/islas page rendering: BLOCKED - cannot test without successful student login
Cross-role: Student accessing /dashboard → redirect to /islas: BLOCKED

student_login_failure.issue: Student login with valid code fails with generic error
student_login_failure.root_cause: Supabase anonymous sign-ins are disabled in the project settings. The studentLoginAction uses signInAnonymously() which requires this feature to be enabled.
student_login_failure.error_log: [error][student.login] anonymous sign-in failed { err: 'Anonymous sign-ins are disabled' }
reproduction_steps: 5. Actual: Error message '¡Uy! Algo no salió bien. Probá de nuevo en un momento.'
student_login_failure.fix: Enable anonymous sign-ins in Supabase Dashboard: Authentication > Providers > Anonymous Sign-In > Toggle ON
student_login_failure.status: NOT FIXED - requires Supabase Dashboard access
